member.name: M:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.GameInstallerRegistry.RegisterGameInstallPlugin(launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.IGameInstaller,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.ReleaseInfo})
member.summary: Called by a plugin to register itself as a game installer

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.GameInstallerRegistry.GameInstallPlugins
member.summary: All registered game install plugins

member.name: M:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.IGameInstaller.Install(System.String,launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.ReleaseInfo,System.IProgress{System.Double},System.IProgress{System.String})
member.summary: Install the game to the given directory.
member.param: Where the game should be installed. This directory should directly contain the game files.
The the user selected to install.
Reports progress from 0 to 100, displayed on the installer's progress bar.
Reports a status message string, displayed on the bottom of the installer.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.IGameInstaller.GameName
member.summary: The name of the game your installer plugin installs.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.ILauncherPlugin.Name
member.summary: The name of your plugin.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.ILauncherPlugin.Description
member.summary: Description of your plugin to show in UI. Optional, set to null if you don't want it, but highly recommended.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.ILauncherPlugin.TargetApiVersion
member.summary: The version of the launcher.NET plugin API your plugin was built for.

member.name: M:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.ILauncherPlugin.Initialize
member.summary: Called when the plugin is loaded.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginConfig.TempDir
member.summary: Temporary directory where plugins can put things.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginConfig.GamesDir
member.summary: The games directory

member.name: F:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginConfig.UserAgent
member.summary: User agent for plugins to use when making requests to APIs

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginGameInfo.ExePath
member.summary: The path of the game's executable.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginGameInfo.RunWithCmd
member.summary: Whether the game should be run through cmd when launched. False by default.

member.name: M:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginTools.FindGameExe(System.String,launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginTools.GameSearchOptions)
member.summary: Finds the most likely game EXE in a folder
member.returns: Full path to the found game EXE
member.exception: Thrown if no suitable EXE is found

member.name: T:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginTools.GameSearchOptions
member.summary: Options that control how searches for game executables.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginTools.GameSearchOptions.SearchSubdirectories
member.summary: If true, the search will include all subdirectories of the specified folder. If false, only the top-level folder will be searched. Default is true.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginTools.GameSearchOptions.ExcludeHelpers
member.summary: If true, the search will include helpers such as the Unity crash handler. If false, helpers will be ignored. Default is false.

member.name: M:launcherdotnet.PluginAPI.PluginTools.GameSearchOptions.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct with optional settings.
member.param: Determines whether subdirectories should be included in the search. Defaults to true.
Determines whether common helper executables should be excluded. Defaults to false.

member.name: T:launcherdotnet.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:launcherdotnet.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:launcherdotnet.ApplicationConfiguration
member.summary: Bootstrap the application configuration.

member.name: M:launcherdotnet.ApplicationConfiguration.Initialize
